Welcome to Ghosted

An OSRS clan hall for stream nights, events, and people who keep showing up.

Join DiscordOpen App Hub
CommunityRoster, events, and clan compsRewardsBalance and ledgerGiveawaysLive dropsCasinoPoints floor

How it works

Three layers. One clan.

Watch

Twitch starts it.

Live stream moments and watch nights on the vghosted channel create the first reason to show up.

Belong

Discord holds it.

Roles, events, and daily conversation live where the community already talks and coordinates.

Act

The app drives it.

Rewards, giveaways, competitions, and casino play give members repeatable reasons to come back.

Welcome

Come hang out and get involved.

Join DiscordOpen App Hub
